Also note: the box at [32-35, 36-39] that I created earlier has changed from color 'G' to 'c' (charcoal). Interesting - it seems the created box reverted to the original charcoal color.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at 40-43, 33-35, below box at 36-39, 32-35
# Press SPACE to activate

result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"SPACE result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"\nAll objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['id'] == 0: continue
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, rows=[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols=[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
